titleStmt.title: SII 28.14: original edition by J. Sundaram
No. 14. (A.R. No. 14 of 1913.) PERAMBALŪR, PERAMBALUR TALUK, TIRUCHIRAPPALLI DISTRICT.

summary.p: Madanagōpālasvāmin Temple-Central Shrine, north and west bases.

p.hi: Śaka 1432, Prabhava, Makara, Amāvāsyā, Pūrāḍam, solar eclipseirregular

summary.p: Records a grant of wet-land (nañchey) of 250 kuḻi extent in two plots for the food-offerings (amudu-paḍi) of God Gōpāla-kūttar of Perumbadūr by Timmiyappa-nāyakkar Ṉūkki-raḍḍiyār, agent of Eṟamāñchi Tulukkaṇanāyakkar. The navagrahas are mentioned but the context is not clear. The two bodies, periya-maṇḍlikar and chiriya-maṇḍalikar are mentioned probably as those who were nominated to manage the land granted, on behalf of the temple.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . śagābdam 1000 6 100 3 10 2 Itaṉmel cellā niṉṟa piṟapava samvatsarattu magaranāyaṟṟu Amāvāsiyaiyum pūrāṭamū [nakṣatti*]ram peṟṟa sūryyagrahāṇa puṇṇiya kālattile yeṟāmāñci tulukkaṇa nāyakkar kāriyattukkuk kaṭavār timmiyappa nāyakkar ṉūkki raṭṭiyār nāṟa ṅka nātar muṉpāka sahiraṇyodakadāra pūrvvamāka perumpalūr kopāla kūttaṟku Āḷvāṟkku navagrahaṅkaḷum
yegādaśa stanattu palamuṇṭāka veṇum yeṉṟu karuniṟaiyeri kiḻ Oṭaikku teṟkku melaivākkālukku kamakkuRead kiḻakkukaṟakuttukku vaṭakku tiruvāḻi kallukku meṟku nañcai kuḻi 2 100mā vaṭakālil taṭṭāṉ kuḷattukku kiḻ nañcai kuḻi 5 10āka nilam 2 100 5 10 Āṇṭavar caṉti Āka tiṉam nāmiyamutuRead nāḻiyamutupaṭiyamutu cey paṇṇavum Inta nilam nampimāre kaikkoṇṭu
Amutu ceya paṇṇavum Inta taṉmattukku Inta nilam periyamaṇṭalikarukkuma ciṟumaṇṭalikarukkum per pātiyāka kaSome portion between lines 3 and 4 is lost
ṉṟa pāvattile pokak kaṭavarkaḷ Āka kaṭṭaḷai Iṭṭom Antappaṭikku tāṉattārāṇṭu perum Aṉupaviccu koḷḷavutu .
Digital edition of SII 28.14 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
